module.slidesOnlyNotice: Summarized from lecture slides only — no transcript was available for this module. Cross-check details against your primary materials.

home.title: FAR condensed notes
home.intro: One module per page, in Becker order. Journals, schedules, and comparison tables are rendered in ledger format; diagrams are for rapid revision. Tap a module to begin.

errors.notFound: That page doesn't exist. Pick a module from the left.
errors.loadFailed: Couldn't load this module. Check your connection and try again.
errors.pendingBody: This module hasn't been written yet. It will appear here as soon as it's ready.
